metadata.title: AI Registry
metadata.description: Use-case-first AI Registry for documentation, governance and evidence management under the EU AI Act.

auth.welcomeSubtitle: Every organisation using AI maintains an AI Registry.
auth.welcomeDescription: An AI Registry is the internal standard structure for capturing, assessing and evidencing AI use within an organisation.

marketing.heroTitle: Every organisation using AI maintains an AI Registry.
marketing.heroDescription: Any organisation can document AI use cases, create Use Case Passes and share public evidence links without paying for this foundation. That keeps the standard open, usable and easy to adopt.
marketing.heroCommitmentTitle: Use Case Passes, verify links and core documentation stay free.
marketing.heroCommitmentDescription: If AI Registry is meant to become the real standard, the core work must remain openly accessible: documentation, pass creation and standardised links for individual use cases.
marketing.featureResponsibilityDescription: Use cases, Use Case Passes and public evidence links can be created and shared without ongoing fees.
marketing.featureStatusDescription: From draft to formal review, every state remains traceable.
marketing.featureEvidenceDescription: Use Case Pass as PDF and JSON. Standardised. Audit-ready. Shareable.
marketing.privacyNote: Private and internal to your organisation. Your data stays within your registry instance.
marketing.shareNote: Evidence and register extracts can be shared in a standardised format.

register.title: AI Registry
register.description: All AI use cases in your organisation
register.purposePlaceholder: Describe the purpose of this AI system

governance.title: Governance
governance.settingsDesc: Organisation-wide rules for roles, review cycles, external capture and access codes.

raci.title: Role matrix (RACI)
raci.description: Define who is responsible for which governance task. These assignments are automatically inherited by new use cases.

scope.title: Scope
scope.description: In which areas does your organisation use AI? Multiple selections allowed.

review.title: Review logic
review.riskBasedHint: High-risk systems are reviewed more frequently; systems with minimal risk less often.
review.eventBasedHint: Reviews are triggered by incidents, regulatory changes or significant system changes.
review.fixedHint: All systems are reviewed on the same fixed schedule.

incident.title: Incident management
incident.configDesc: How are AI-related incidents handled? These settings apply organisation-wide.

competency.title: Competency & ISO alignment
competency.requirementsHint: Which training does your organisation require for AI responsible persons?

iso.title: ISO alignment
iso.hint: Optional alignment with ISO standards for extended audit evidence.
iso.iso27001Desc: Information security – relevant controls are mapped in the audit export.
iso.iso42001Desc: AI management system – structured governance for AI according to international standards.

publicDisclosure.title: Show organisation publicly
publicDisclosure.description: When enabled, the organisation name appears on the public verify page.

control.title: Governance Control Centre
control.description: Maturity level, open tasks and current governance status
control.reviewsDesc: Process formal reviews and prioritised governance actions in one place.
control.policiesDesc: Create and maintain policies and link them cleanly to documented use cases.
control.exportsDesc: Generate governance reports, policy bundles and audit-ready evidence packages.
control.trustPortalDesc: Control which evidence and transparency signals may be publicly visible.
control.academyDesc: Start training, track progress and build governance competency directly from the premium tier.
control.overviewDesc: See maturity level, open tasks and current governance status in one report.
control.governanceSettingsDesc: Define roles, policies, incident processes and review logic for your organisation.

welcome.title: Welcome to the Governance Control Centre
welcome.heading: Governance Control Centre
welcome.activationSuccessDesc: You keep the Free Register and additionally gain the complete governance tier for reviews, policies, exports, Trust Portal and Academy.
welcome.premiumActive: The premium tier is active for {orgName}. You now have access to reviews, policies, export and trust functions, and the Academy.
welcome.nextStep: Start in Governance Settings, then check Reviews and activate Policies and Exports.
welcome.nextStepNoAccess: First open the activation in Governance Settings.
welcome.loadingDesc: Checkout, entitlement sync and premium navigation are being confirmed.
welcome.preparing: We are assigning your activation and preparing premium access.
welcome.preparingNextStep: Once the billing return is confirmed, we will show all activated areas.
welcome.notActiveDesc: Open Governance Settings to start the activation or check the billing status.
welcome.notAvailableDesc: This page is available after successful governance activation.
welcome.reviewsDescription: Process formal reviews, assign deadlines and document assessments.
welcome.settingsDescription: Define roles, policies and organisation-wide standards.
welcome.policiesDescription: Create and maintain policies based on your use cases.
welcome.trustDescription: Control which evidence should be publicly visible.

billing.title: Plan & activation
billing.freeDesc: Register, intake, external inbox and basic governance remain active. Reviews, policies, exports and Academy require the governance tier.
billing.proDesc: Reviews, Policy Engine, exports, Trust Portal and Academy are activated.
billing.enterpriseDesc: Organisation, reviews, policies, exports and identity processes are activated for this workspace profile.
billing.yearlyHint: Annual billing reduces the governance tier cost by almost two months compared to monthly.
billing.workspaceContext: Billing is based on the currently open workspace context.
billing.freeHint: The Pro tier is determined in the hosted Stripe checkout based on active users and documented use cases, then automatically assigned to this register or workspace.
billing.maxLevelHint: This workspace profile is already at the highest activation tier.
billing.billingActionUnavailable: The billing action is currently unavailable.
billing.syncSuccessPro: Governance Control Centre has been activated for this account.
billing.syncSuccessEnterprise: Enterprise has been assigned to this workspace profile.
billing.syncFailedDesc: The checkout return was detected but could not yet be fully assigned.

settings.savedDesc: Register-wide rules, roles and access codes have been updated.
settings.loadingDesc: Organisation data, roles, review logic and access codes are being prepared.
settings.noRegisterDesc: Create a register first so governance rules can be maintained.

exposure.riskAssessmentDescription: A risk assessment is legally required for high-risk systems.

intake.title: Submit AI use case without login
intake.description: Use an access code to submit details directly to the right register.
intake.descriptionFull: Use an access code to submit details directly to the correct register. This form is separate from the internal workspace and serves only for structured intake.
intake.enterCodeDescription: Enter the code you received from the responsible organisation.
intake.verifyingCodeDesc: We are checking whether this access code is active and belongs to a valid register.
intake.submissionSavedDescription: "{purpose}" has been recorded as a traceable external submission.
intake.directAccessDescription: You are signed in as the register owner. This link is assigned directly to your register.
intake.purposePlaceholder: Describe what this AI system is used for

asidePoints.0: Submissions are stored as traceable entries and reviewed internally.
asidePoints.1: Public forms do not show internal register or governance views.
asidePoints.2: After submission, the next step is internal: document, review or follow up.

industries.freeNote: Documenting all AI use cases is permanently free — no credit card, no time limit.
industries.allSubtitle: The EU AI Act applies across all sectors. The specific requirements vary by industry and use context.
